anomalies.title: Mortgage jumped £645/mo — Oct 2025
anomalies.detail: Santander 037526809 rose from £1,692 to £2,337 in Oct 2025, now £2,327. Likely end of fixed rate. A mortgage broker conversation could identify savings.

anomalies.title: Thames Water doubled — Nov 2025
anomalies.detail: Went from £66/mo to £122/mo with no explanation. Call Thames Water on 0800 980 8800, quoting ref 1147132279.

anomalies.title: Broadband — nothing visible after BT stopped Jul 2025
anomalies.detail: BT Group PLC (£126–132/mo) last charged Jul 2025. No replacement visible in the data. Confirm current broadband arrangement.

anomalies.title: Vodafone double-charging some months
anomalies.detail: Contracts 7054092163-1001 and device 1004032856 both show two charges in the same month on occasion. Could be two separate plans or catch-up payments — confirm with Vodafone.

anomalies.title: Netlify spike Mar 2026
anomalies.detail: 4–5 charges totalling ~£70 in Mar 2026 vs normal £15/mo. Check netlify.com dashboard for bandwidth overages or multiple sites.

anomalies.title: D&G DBNJ policy — 60% price increase Mar 2026
anomalies.detail: Rose from £10.45 to £16.71 in Mar 2026. Call D&G on 0800 030 4390 to query.

anomalies.title: Aviva B528162EN — confirm what this covers
anomalies.detail: Running 18+ months at £43/mo with no increases. Worth calling Aviva to confirm exactly what this covers and whether it is still needed.

anomalies.title: Amazon Prime — £95 charge Jul 2025
anomalies.detail: One large charge of £95 in Jul 2025 instead of the usual £8.99. Could be an annual plan or a Prime Video channel add-on. Check Amazon account.
